name: Darktrace
description: Monitor Darktrace AI-powered cybersecurity platform for model breaches, network devices, and AI Analyst incidents

credentialFields.label: Darktrace Appliance URL
credentialFields.helpText: Full URL of your Darktrace appliance (e.g., https://darktrace.yourcompany.com)

credentialFields.label: Public API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Threat Visualizer > System Config > Settings > API Token > New

credentialFields.label: Private API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Generated with the Public Token. Record securely — displayed only once.

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Lists Darktrace model breaches from the past 7 days to verify active security monitoring and alerting coverage

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists devices monitored by Darktrace to verify network infrastructure inventory and visibility

checks.name: Incident Response
checks.description: Checks Darktrace AI Analyst for critical incidents in the last 30 days to verify incident response coverage
